source_section.title_label_raw: Landscaped Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers

sections.title_label_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: The requirements of Sections 427, 428, and 429 shall not apply to:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: any development exempted from requiring a development permit in Section 9;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: a change of use or tenancy in a structure;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: accessory structures located in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, or UC-1 zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: an addition to any main building less than 200.0 square metres in floor area;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: low-density dwelling uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: renovations; or (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: Repealed (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Buffers Development Exempted from Landscaped Buffers
provisions.text: temporary construction uses. General Landscaped Buffer Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be provided where a development abuts a different zone. The required landscaped buffer shall be either "L1" or "L2", as shown in Table 14.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: Any required landscaped buffer shall be provided along each lot line that separates the development from the different zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: Any required landscaped buffer shall have a minimum width of 2.5 metres. Table 14: Landscaped buffer requirement Zone abutting the development DD, DH CEN-2, CEN-1 COR HR-2, HR-1 ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1 INS, UC- 2, UC-1, H PCF, RPK Zone where the development is located DD L1 L1 L2 L1 DH L1 L1 L2 L1 CEN-2 L1 L1 L2 L1 CEN-1 L1 L1 L2 L1 COR L2 L1 HR-2 L1 HR-1 L1 CLI L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 LI L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 HRI L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 L2 INS L1 L2 L1 UC-2 L1 L2 L1 UC-1 L1 L2 L1

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: No structures or parking areas are permitted within any required landscaped buffer, except for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: masonry walls or opaque fences required in Sections 425 or 429; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: subject to Subsection 427(5), underground parking structures that do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade within any side or rear yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A landscaped buffer, where required in Table 14, shall be
provisions.text: If an underground parking structure extends into the required landscaped buffer, as permitted in Clause 427(4)(b), then the applicable landscape buffer shall apply to the surface of the underground parking structure. L1 General Landscaped Buffer

sections.title_label_raw: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:
provisions.text: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:
provisions.text: one shrub no less than 1.0 metre in height for every 2.0 linear metres of buffer; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:
provisions.text: one tree that is not a shrub with a minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres for every 4.5 linear metres of buffer.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:
provisions.text: Trees or shrubs required in Clauses 428(1)(a) and 428(1)(b) may be grouped.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain either:
provisions.text: The remainder of a required L1 landscaped buffer shall contain soft landscaping. L2 Screen Landscaped Buffer

sections.title_label_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:
provisions.text: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:
provisions.text: subject to Subsection 429(2), a continuous coniferous hedge no less than 1.0 metre in height; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:
provisions.text: a minimum of one tree with a base caliper that is no less than 50 millimetres for every 4.5 linear metres of buffer.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:
provisions.text: Where an L2 landscaped buffer abuts an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK zone, an opaque fence, masonry wall, or coniferous hedge no less than 1.8 metres in height shall be required along the lot line abutting the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:
provisions.text: Trees in a required L2 landscaped buffer may be grouped.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain:
provisions.text: The remainder of a required L2 landscaped buffer shall contain soft landscaping.
